message:
feat: add CxScope RAII guard for context lifecycle and MuxPool health check timeout

cx.rs: add CxScope RAII guard that pushes a context-scoped Cx on
creation and pops it on drop, ensuring proper cleanup even on panic
or early return. Add push_cx_scope() and CxScope::current() helpers.
Add tests for scope nesting and drop-based cleanup.

mux_pool.rs: add health_check_with_timeout() that wraps health_check
in a configurable timeout, returning HealthCheckTimedOut on expiry
instead of hanging indefinitely. Add test for timeout behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
